summary: AgriSmart Terminal Phase 2 (Iteration 111) - All WebSocket + PO verification features tested and working. Complete testing of: WebSocket endpoints for pairing/terminal, PO send-to-terminal locking, 423 response for locked PO edit, terminal-finalize with variance recording, terminal notify API, and frontend UI changes.

backend_api_tests.send_draft_po_to_terminal: PASS - Draft PO sent to terminal, status becomes 'sent_to_terminal'
backend_api_tests.send_ordered_po_to_terminal: PASS - Ordered PO can be sent to terminal
backend_api_tests.cannot_send_received_po: PASS - Received PO correctly rejected for send-to-terminal
backend_api_tests.edit_locked_po_returns_423: PASS - PUT /api/purchase-orders/{po_id} returns 423 when PO is sent_to_terminal
backend_api_tests.terminal_finalize_unlocks_po: PASS - terminal-finalize changes status back to 'ordered' with terminal_verified=true
backend_api_tests.terminal_finalize_records_variances: PASS - Variances correctly recorded with ordered/received/difference fields
backend_api_tests.terminal_finalize_requires_status: PASS - Finalize only works for sent_to_terminal status POs
backend_api_tests.terminal_notify_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/terminal/notify sends events to branch terminals
backend_api_tests.terminal_notify_requires_params: PASS - Notify validates required branch_id and event_type
backend_api_tests.po_list_includes_sent_to_terminal: PASS - PO list shows sent_to_terminal status POs
backend_api_tests.po_filter_by_sent_to_terminal: PASS - Can filter POs by sent_to_terminal status
backend_api_tests.existing_pairing_flow: PASS - No regression on terminal pairing flow
backend_api_tests.po_receive_flow: PASS - Standard PO creation still works
backend_api_tests.active_terminals_list: PASS - GET /api/terminal/active lists terminals without token

frontend_ui_tests.po_page_send_to_terminal_btn: PASS - Found 23 'Send to Terminal' buttons for draft/ordered POs
frontend_ui_tests.po_page_locked_badge: PASS - Found 3 'Locked — checking on terminal' badges
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_pairing_screen: PASS - Shows 6-char code with countdown timer
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_shell_after_pairing: PASS - Terminal transitions to shell after pairing
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_po_check_tab: PASS - PO Check tab shows sent_to_terminal POs
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_po_detail_dialog: PASS - PO detail shows qty input, finalize button
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_finalize_success: PASS - Finalize shows success toast, PO removed from list
frontend_ui_tests.main_pos_sales_page: PASS - Sales page loads with all navigation items

verified_features: PUT /api/purchase-orders/{po_id} returns 423 when PO is sent_to_terminal (locked)
POST /api/purchase-orders/{po_id}/terminal-finalize verifies quantities and unlocks PO
Terminal finalize records variances correctly (ordered, received, difference)
POST /api/terminal/notify sends events to branch terminals
PO page shows 'Send to Terminal' button for draft/ordered POs
PO page shows 'Locked — checking on terminal' badge for sent_to_terminal POs
PO page shows 'Terminal verified' badge after terminal verification
PO page filter includes sent_to_terminal in 'Ordered' filter (shown as 'On Terminal')
Terminal PO Check page fetches sent_to_terminal POs
Terminal PO Check page allows quantity adjustment and finalization
Terminal pairing screen shows 'Waiting for connection...' animation
No regression on existing terminal pairing flow
No regression on existing PO receive flow
No regression on main POS sales pages
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connections properly managed in terminal_ws.py with connect/disconnect handlers
PO locking uses status 'sent_to_terminal' - PUT endpoint checks this and returns 423 Locked
Terminal finalize preserves original_ordered quantity and calculates variance difference
Real-time notifications sent via WebSocket when PO is sent to terminal
Frontend PO page correctly shows different action buttons based on PO status
Terminal PO Check fetches only 'sent_to_terminal' status POs for the branch
Polling fallback maintained in terminal pairing (3s interval) alongside WebSocket primary
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test POs during testing - Test Vendor Phase2, Lock Test Vendor, Finalize Test Vendor, Variance Test Vendor. Also created terminal sessions via pairing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 builds on Phase 1 (iteration_110). Key selectors: send-terminal-po-{id}, terminal-po-check, po-item-{id}, po-qty-{idx}, finalize-po-btn, po-notes-input. PO flow: 1) PC sends via POST /send-to-terminal, 2) Status becomes 'sent_to_terminal' (displayed as 'On Terminal'), 3) PC edit returns 423 Locked, 4) Terminal fetches POs with status 'sent_to_terminal', 5) Terminal verifies and calls POST /terminal-finalize, 6) PO status returns to 'ordered' with terminal_verified=true. WebSocket: pairing at /api/terminal/ws/pairing/{code}, terminal at /api/terminal/ws/terminal/{terminal_id}.
